name: [GenAI][Order Support Assistant] Workflow success rate below target
message: Workflow success rate has dropped below the 98% SLO target for low/medium-risk workflows. See runbook: docs/roadmap.md#suggested-production-slos. @pagerduty-genai-oncall
source_addendum_ref: AI Observability - Datadog Implementation Addendum, §8 (Suggested production SLOs and alert policies)
